game_name: Gunforce: Battle Fire Engulfed Terror Island

danger_signals.visual_form: Bright colored bullets and energy blasts contrasting against background
Distinct animated hostile units with military/mechanical design
danger_signals.meaning: Threatening presence in current screen area

danger_signals.visual_form: Flames, explosions, destructible terrain with warning coloration
danger_signals.meaning: Stage-specific dangers independent of enemy AI

danger_signals.visual_form: Large sprite occupying significant screen real estate, distinct from standard enemies
danger_signals.meaning: Escalated threat requiring pattern recognition and adaptation

safety_signals.visual_form: Glowing collectible items dropping from defeated enemies or environmental sources
Areas with minimal enemy presence and no visible projectiles
safety_signals.meaning: Momentary reprieve for positioning or recovery

safety_signals.visual_form: HUD elements displaying player resource status

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Player sprite positioned at screen bottom, controlled via input

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Progressive enemy types through stage progression; humanoid soldiers, mechanical units, armored vehicles
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Fortified positions, bases with architectural military design elements

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Dense enemy spawn patterns, continuous projectile fire, animated hazards
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies track and attack player; projectile streams increase in frequency

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Screen empties of threats; brief pause before next wave spawns
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Reduced enemy activity; opportunity for pickup collection

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Boss sprite entry animation; stage background may darken or shift; special visual effects
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Boss executes complex attack patterns; player must adapt strategy

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Flame sprites overlaying environment; destructible objects show damage states
world_state_to_visual.meaning: Stage environmental hazard active; visual communication of 'terror island' setting

environmental_storytelling.example: Movement from jungle/beach terrain through military installations to island stronghold communicates invasion narrative
Early stages feature basic soldiers; later stages feature heavier armor and mechanical units suggesting escalating defensive commitment
Visible explosions and burning structures in background layers establish active warzone setting without explicit cutscenes
Fortified bunkers, turret positions, and military structures communicate occupying hostile force infrastructure

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Advances toward player position; fires projectiles in predetermined or tracking patterns
Slower movement; persistent attack pattern; requires multiple hits to defeat
Fixed or limited position; continuous fire arc; high projectile density
Complex multi-phase attack sequences; visual telegraphing through animation frames
Sprite may flash or display visual damage indicator; reduced evasion margin

notes: Gunforce operates as arcade-style vertical shmup with militaristic setting (Terror Island). Visual communication relies heavily on sprite contrast, animation density for threat conveyance, and environmental background storytelling rather than narrative text. Faction distinction minimal—primarily player vs. monolithic hostile force. World state changes communicated through spawn pattern intensity and environmental hazard activation rather than dramatic visual transitions. T3 tier assessment appropriate as specific pixel data/frame counts not available from source material.
